app_info.subtitle: Tube diagnostics
app_info.description: Resovii Pocket Technician helps qualified hospital pneumatic-tube technicians work through equipment-only troubleshooting reports. It selects one reviewed diagnostic check at a time, states required safety stops, asks for the observed result, and avoids patient, specimen, medication, and medical-record information.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only computes a reviewed diagnostic recommendation from supplied equipment context and does not create, update, or delete records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, submit forms, or change external internet or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, control equipment, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Select the first reviewed check for a missing carrier report.
test_cases.user_prompt: A carrier is missing after a send to the receiving station. What should I check first?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns one reviewed missing-carrier diagnostic step with a concise follow-up question for the observed result.

test_cases.description: Handle a station that will not make position.
test_cases.user_prompt: Station 014 will not make position and the local display says position fault.
test_cases.expected_output: Matches the report to a station position procedure and returns one safe check with expected observation text.

test_cases.description: Surface a safety stop when the reviewed procedure requires shutdown.
test_cases.user_prompt: The blower is making unusual noise and I need the next safe diagnostic check.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a reviewed check and clearly states any shutdown or lockout/tagout requirement before continuing.

test_cases.description: Continue a selected guide after one completed step.
test_cases.user_prompt: For the station-position-failure guide, I completed step 0 and the result did not match the expected position indication.
test_cases.expected_output: Uses the selected guide context and completed step index to return the next reviewed check rather than repeating the completed step.

test_cases.description: Reject protected health information before troubleshooting.
test_cases.user_prompt: MRN: A123456 was on the carrier label and the station is faulting. What should I do?
test_cases.expected_output: Stops the diagnostic flow and asks the user to remove patient or medical-record information before restating the equipment-only issue.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a meeting with the maintenance team tomorrow morning.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because scheduling is outside its supported workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for patient care or clinical diagnosis requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: A patient has chest pain after transport. What diagnosis should I consider?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because clinical care and diagnosis are outside its scope.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for live equipment control requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Send a carrier from station 014 to the lab right now.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked to issue live tube-system commands or control equipment.
